rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Translations must update both messages/en.json and messages/he.json whenever new UI text is added.","scope":"i18n"},{"kind":"convention","text":"API endpoints branch on isAdmin/role to return filtered (user-scoped) vs. unfiltered (admin) datasets.","scope":"API design"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Admin dashboard uses courses[].instructors[] array on course entity rather than separate instructor->courses mapping.","scope":"data model"}]}
